R

RangeControl - Class in microui.core
Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.
RangeControl(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.RangeControl
Constructs a RangeControl with specified position and dimensions.
REACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
Hooks are called immediately when changes occur.
REACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator.ReactionMode
Animation direction changes immediately when condition changes.
ReactiveShadow - Class in microui.core.effect
A reactive shadow effect that dynamically adjusts its intensity based on mouse position.
ReactiveShadow() - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.ReactiveShadow
Constructs a ReactiveShadow with default properties.
ReactiveShadow(ContentView) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.ReactiveShadow
Constructs a ReactiveShadow with a specified target ContentView.
recalculate() - Method in class microui.layout.GridLayout
Recalculates and positions all child components within the grid.
recalculate() - Method in class microui.layout.LayoutManager
Recalculates the layout of all entries in the container.
recalculate() - Method in class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayout
Recalculates the layout by positioning and sizing all entries based on their weights.
RECT - Enum constant in enum class microui.component.CheckBox.CheckStyle
Displays a filled rectangle.
RED - Static variable in class microui.core.style.Color
Pure red color
redo() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Performs a redo operation, reapplying the next text state.
redo() - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Performs a redo operation, reapplying the next text state.
redo() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Redoes the last undone text modification.
register(Object) - Static method in class microui.util.Metrics
Registers an object creation in the metrics.
RELEASE - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Mouse release event (EDGE).
RELEASED - Enum constant in enum class microui.event.EventType
Mouse released state (LEVEL).
remove(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Removes characters between specified positions.
remove(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Removes characters between specified positions.
remove(String...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Removes items by their titles.
remove(Container...) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Removes one or more containers from the manager.
remove(ContentView) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Removes a ContentView from the container.
removeAll() - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Removes all child components from the container.
removeBufferedView(BufferedView) - Method in class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Removes a BufferedView from this graphics buffer.
removeById(int) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Removes a ContentView from the container by its numeric ID.
removeById(int...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Removes items by their IDs.
removeById(int...) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Removes containers by their numeric IDs.
removeByTextId(String) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Removes a ContentView from the container by its text ID.
removeByTextId(String...) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Removes items by their text IDs.
removeByTextId(String...) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Removes containers by their text IDs.
removeChar() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Removes the character at the current cursor position.
removeCharAt(int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Removes a character at the specified position.
removeCharAt(int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Removes a character at the specified position.
removeCharForLine(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Removes a character at a specific position in a line.
removeFirstChar() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Removes the first character.
removeFirstChar() - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Removes the first character.
removeLastChar() - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Removes the last character.
removeLastChar() - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Removes the last character.
removeLine(int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Removes a line at the specified index.
removeListener(EventType, Listener) - Method in class microui.event.InteractionHandler
Removes a listener for a specific event type.
removeSelectedText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Removes the currently selected text.
removeStringForLine(int, int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Removes a substring from a line.
removeTexture() - Method in class microui.core.ImageBuffer
Removes the currently loaded image texture.
render() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Renders the current state of the ContainerManager.
RendererConfig - Class in microui
Provides setting for configuration of rendering mode
RendererConfig.Mode - Enum Class in microui
Rendering modes for MicroUI component behavior.
RenderException - Exception in microui.core.exception
Exception thrown when rendering operations encounter errors or invalid states.
RenderException(String) - Constructor for exception microui.core.exception.RenderException
Constructs a RenderException with the specified detail message.
requestUpdateWeights() - Method in class microui.core.effect.ReactiveShadow
Requests an immediate update of shadow weights based on current mouse position.
reset() - Method in class microui.util.Timer
Resets the timer to the START value.
resetAnimationProgress() - Method in class microui.core.style.LerpedColor
Resets the animation progress to the beginning (start color).
resetMargin() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Resets all margin values to zero.
resetPadding() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Resets all padding values to zero.
resetSelection() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Clears the current selection (sets to empty selection at position 0,0).
RESPECT_CONSTRAINTS - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.Container.Mode
Respect component constraints during layout (default).
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class microui.component.MenuButton.DirectionMode
Always place sub-menus to the right.
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.TextEditorModel.Direction
Right direction, typically used for moving cursor right.
Ripples - Class in microui.core.effect
Ripple effect animation that creates expanding circular waves from click/touch points.
Ripples(Component) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.Ripples
Constructs a Ripples effect for the specified component.
RowLayout - Class in microui.layout
Row layout manager that arranges components horizontally.
RowLayout() - Constructor for class microui.layout.RowLayout
Constructs a RowLayout with horizontal orientation.
RowLayoutParams - Class in microui.layout
Layout parameters for RowLayout.
RowLayoutParams(float) - Constructor for class microui.layout.RowLayoutParams
Constructs RowLayoutParams with specified weight and center vertical alignment.
RowLayoutParams(float, int) - Constructor for class microui.layout.RowLayoutParams
Constructs RowLayoutParams with specified weight and vertical alignment.
